ddls:
CREATE TABLE "properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property */,
  "ubi" TEXT /* UBI (Unique Building Identifier) of the property */,
  "gba" INTEGER /* GBA (Gross Building Area) of the property */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the property */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city where the property is located */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state where the property is located */,
  "zip_id" INTEGER /* ID of the zip code of the property */,
  "property_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property type */,
  "year_built" INTEGER /* Year the property was built */,
  "number_of_bedrooms" INTEGER /* Number of bedrooms in the property */,
  "number_of_bathrooms" INTEGER /* Number of bathrooms in the property */,
  "square_footage" INTEGER /* Square footage of the property */,
  "lot_size" REAL /* Lot size in acres */,
  "parking_capacity" INTEGER /* Parking capacity of the property */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_zip_id FOREIGN KEY ("zip_id") REFERENCES zips ("zip_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "owners" (
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each owner */,
  "owner_name" TEXT /* Name of the owner */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the owner */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the owner */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Company name of the owner */,
  "company_address" TEXT /* Company address of the owner */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("owner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_owners" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the owner */,
  "ownership_date" TEXT /* Date the owner acquired the property */,
  "ownership_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of ownership */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id", "owner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_types" (
  "property_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property type */,
  "property_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the property type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the property type */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the property type (e.g., commercial, residential) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state where the city is located */,
  "county" TEXT /* County where the city is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the city */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "state_code" TEXT /* Abbreviated code for the state */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the state is located (e.g., northeast, south) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "zips" (
  "zip_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each zip code */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the property */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city where the zip code is located */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the zip code */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the zip code */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("zip_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_values" (
  "property_value_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property value */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the property */,
  "valuation_date" TEXT /* Date the property was valued */,
  "valuation_method" TEXT /* Method used to determine the property value (e.g., appraisal, sale) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_value_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_values_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_images" (
  "property_image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property image */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the property image */,
  "image_description" TEXT /* Description of the property image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_images_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, manager, owner) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Password hash for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "user_permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permission granted to the user (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property associated with the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_notes" (
  "property_note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property note */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property */,
  "note" TEXT /* Note about the property */,
  "note_date" TEXT /* Date the note was added */,
  "note_author" TEXT /* Author of the note */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_notes_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_documents" (
  "property_document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property document */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property */,
  "document_url" TEXT /* URL of the property document */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of document (e.g., deed, permit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_documents_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leases" (
  "lease_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lease */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property */,
  "lease_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the lease */,
  "lease_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the lease */,
  "rent_amount" REAL /* Rent amount for the lease */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lease_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leases_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tenants" (
  "tenant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tenant */,
  "lease_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lease associated with the tenant */,
  "tenant_name" TEXT /* Name of the tenant */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the tenant */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the tenant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tenant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tenants_lease_id FOREIGN KEY ("lease_id") REFERENCES leases ("lease_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "work_orders" (
  "work_order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each work order */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property associated with the work order */,
  "work_order_date" TEXT /* Date the work order was created */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the work order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the work order (e.g., open, in progress, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("work_order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_work_orders_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "work_order_assignments" (
  "work_order_assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each work order assignment */,
  "work_order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the work order */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user assigned to the work order */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date the work order was assigned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("work_order_assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_work_order_assignments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_work_order_assignments_work_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("work_order_id") REFERENCES work_orders ("work_order_id")
)
